en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: kuyku i adri ku kemasu. kayta tremimaa.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.
A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: aiwa! tratrima ku driya dra iyasaus.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: aeman! mekan ku lra i ruma.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: an kemadru i, ta ukasayay mekan ku tabu i!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: aekan yu dra manay an karealriyan?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: aekan ku i takesian kana pakasaseber na akanan.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: aekan yu dra manay an karealriyan?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: kemasu ku dra tabu garem. mukasaya ta mekan an karealriyan maw!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: alakan ku driya dra trapulr dra aitrulan maw?
en: A: Can you get me a rag, please?

ab: semasaselrap ku. alakan ku kayu i Alaw.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, ask Alaw to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: miyakitral na papadraran. uwa driya itruli.
en: A: The table is dirty, go clean it.

ab: aiwa! kayku malaka dra trapulr dra aitrul.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: miyakitral idriyu na lataw. uwa itruli driya.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: garemay lra. adri ku driya peniya semelrap kadrini.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: an muruma yu kemay i takesian i, kakuda yu dra manay?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: parenang ku kanku alian muka semenaya.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: an muruma kemay i takesian taytaw i, kakuda taytaw dra manay?
en: A: What's he doing after school?
B: He's going swimming.
